description: Style NoteSylish and in-vogue, this pair of leggings from femella has a hint of retro chic, making it a contemporary essential. The luxe, stretchy fabric is designed to flatter your shape and become a perfect everyday wear. Style this with a kurta and clunky heels or with a tunic and a belt.Product DetailsCream ankle length leggings, has an elasticated waist and panel with decorative buttons at lower legMaterial and CareBlended lycraHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentFlat dry inside out in shadeUse warm ironSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 5'8", waist 26" and hips 36") is wearing a size M
